title: Analytics - Events are gathered if user is logged out but opted into data-sharing
scenario: Analytics events continue to be collected after user logs out when Share Data toggle is enabled in App Settings > General > Account
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → App Settings (gear icon) → General → Account.
3. Ensure the user is logged out of their account.
4. Verify that the 'Share Data' toggle under Account is set to ON (opted into data-sharing).
6. Trigger a device-related event, such as adding a new Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., press the Bluetooth button on the device to pair it via the app).
7. Observe the Firebase Analytics console for the event counts (e.g., 'device_added' event with device serial number).
expected: Analytics events (e.g., device_added with device serial number) should NOT be gathered or sent to Firebase when the user is logged out, even if the Share Data toggle is enabled.
